title.zh: 中医美白淡斑：内调外治的自然美白法
title.en: TCM Whitening & Spot Removal: Natural Brightening from Within

description.zh: 掌握中医美白淡斑的方法，从内调理气血，外用中药面膜，实现自然美白
description.en: Master TCM whitening methods, regulate Qi-Blood internally, use herbal masks externally

zh.text: 中医认为面色暗沉、色斑的形成与气血失调、肝郁气滞、脾胃虚弱等因素有关。美白淡斑不能只靠外用护肤品，更需要从内调理，标本兼治才能见效。
情绪不畅、压力大导致肝气郁结，气血运行不畅，面部出现黄褐斑。
气血亏虚，面部得不到充足滋养，皮肤暗沉无光。
脾虚运化失常，水湿停滞，导致面部浮肿、色斑。
肾精不足，面部失去滋养，出现早衰、色斑。

items: 玫瑰花茶：疏肝理气，活血化瘀
菊花茶：清肝明目，清热解毒
柴胡疏肝散：疏肝解郁经典方

zh.text: 三白汤是古代美白名方，由白芍、白术、白茯苓组成，可美白淡斑、调和气血。

items: 适合面色暗沉、黄褐斑者

zh.text: 玉容散是古代宫廷美容洗面方，可细腻肌肤、美白淡斑。

items: 珍珠粉面膜：美白细腻肌肤

zh.title: 三白美白茶
zh.instructions:
1. 所有材料洗净
2. 加水煮沸
3. 转小火煮15分钟
4. 代茶饮用
5. 每日1次，连续饮用
6. 美白淡斑，调和气血

items: 睡眠充足：促进皮肤修复
情绪舒畅：避免肝郁气滞
饮食清淡：少吃辛辣刺激

zh.text: 温馨提示：美白淡斑需要长期坚持，不可急于求成。色斑严重者建议在中医师指导下进行综合调理。

en.text: TCM believes dull complexion and spots are caused by Qi-Blood imbalance, liver stagnation, spleen weakness, etc. Whitening and spot removal cannot rely only on external skincare - internal regulation is needed for root-and-symptom treatment.
Emotional blockage and stress cause liver Qi stagnation, poor Qi-Blood circulation, resulting in melasma on face.
Qi-Blood deficiency means face lacks sufficient nourishment, causing dull skin.
Spleen dysfunction causes water-dampness stagnation, leading to facial puffiness and spots.
Insufficient kidney essence causes face to lose nourishment, resulting in premature aging and spots.

items: Rose tea: Soothes liver, activates blood
Chrysanthemum tea: Clears liver, brightens eyes
Chai Hu Shu Gan San: Classic liver-soothing formula
Donkey-hide gelatin: Tonifies blood, nourishes Yin
Coix seed: Strengthens spleen, resolves dampness

en.text: San Bai Tang is an ancient whitening formula, composed of White Peony, White Atractylodes, and White Poria, for whitening, spot-fading, and harmonizing Qi-Blood.

items: White Peony: Nourishes blood, softens liver
White Atractylodes: Strengthens spleen, tonifies Qi
White Poria: Strengthens spleen, drains dampness

en.text: Yu Rong San is an ancient palace beauty wash formula, refining skin texture and whitening.

items: Pearl powder mask: Whitens, refines skin
Angelica dahurica mask: Whitens, fades spots
Angelica mask: Activates blood, nourishes face
San Bai powder mask: Whitens, brightens

en.title: San Bai Whitening Tea
en.instructions:
1. Wash all ingredients
2. Boil water
3. Simmer for 15 minutes
4. Drink as tea
5. Once daily, continuous use
6. Whitens, fades spots, harmonizes Qi-Blood

items: Light diet: Reduce spicy, stimulating foods
Drink more water: Promotes metabolism and detox

en.text: Note: Whitening and spot removal requires long-term commitment. Those with severe spots should seek comprehensive TCM regulation under practitioner guidance.
